name: ck
description: Cavekit Framework — spec-driven AI development with an autonomous execution loop. Hunt lifecycle (sketch → map → make → check), per-task token budgets, stop-hook state machine, model-tier routing, auto-backpropagation from test failures, tool-result caching, Codex peer review, Karpathy behavioral guardrails, caveman token compression, knowledge-graph integration, and design-system enforcement.
